headline: A Look At General Mills (GIS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Stock performance snapshot General Mills (GIS) has attracted attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock down 2.6% over the past month and 24.1% over the past 3 months, closing recently at US$33.81. See our latest analysis for General Mills. Those short term share price losses sit on top of a weaker long term picture, with the year to date share price return and 1 year total shareholder return both showing double digit declines. This suggests that momentum has been...
